functional_audit.check: Floating bar loads current-user pathenrollment1 rows (onboarding_data fallback) into horizontal RG bTItY
Selecting an enrollment chip updates selectedEnrollmentId/selectedEnrollment in shared store
Enrollment list items expose currentSessionId for PATHS-07 ?session= URL matching

PathsEnrollmentProvider wraps paths page so grid and floating bar share one enrollment data source (GetElement parity)

ui_evidence.notes: Fixed top-16 full-width strip with fluid w-full/min-w-0; RepeatingGroup_list_ on child RG; matches layout_notes top-anchored FG-services
Canonical horizontal enrollment RG in EnrollmentFloatingBar; duplicate marker also on PathsGridPanel wrapper (PATHS-02) — see C-1
FG-services maps to bTItS FloatingGroup root per IR resolver FG - services__f64be9

critiques.finding: data-bubble-id bTItY appears twice on /paths — EnrollmentFloatingBar horizontal RG (correct per IR /pages/bTHDg/elements/bTItX/elements/bTItd) and PathsGridPanel outer wrapper (ai_RNbBHYHn parent). Selector parity tooling cannot uniquely target the floating-bar RG.
critiques.alternative: Remove bTItY from PathsGridPanel; keep bTItY only on EnrollmentFloatingBar RG and retain ai_RNbBHYHn on the grid RG for PATHS-02 markers.

critiques.finding: Empty-state label No enrolled paths yet in EnrollmentFloatingBar is ad-hoc copy not verified against IR static text for the FG-services RG empty cell.
critiques.alternative: Resolve empty-cell copy from bTHDg slice or drsam-99657.bubble bTItX subtree and centralize in routes.ts constant.

critiques.finding: Floating-bar enrollment cells use compact chip layout (Route icon + title + status) without per-cell Bubble ids from bTHDg slice; decompose noted cell layout ids deferred to IR slice.
critiques.alternative: Add data-bubble-id markers on RG cell subtrees when PATHS-02/06 cell ids are enumerated in decompose follow-up.

critiques.finding: pathsEnrollmentApi.ts re-exports fetchPathEnrollments from dashboard pathEnrollmentApi; enroll/unenroll helpers live in paths module but are primarily exercised by PATHS-03 — not listed in PATHS-06 coverage files_changed.
critiques.alternative: Document cross-item API surface in PATHS-06 coverage or split enroll/unenroll to PATHS-03 coverage for traceability.
